How an investor document flow supported 200+ investors before portals did it well.

A repeatable investor document flow removed messy email back-and-forth, manual document assembly, and repeated data entry.

The challenge

The business had real volume before off-the-shelf tooling was good enough. Every deal created repetitive document work and avoidable founder drag.

The approach

  • Mapped investor intake from first data capture through signing.
  • Separated standard templates from investor-specific variables.
  • Built document and spreadsheet output so clean data became the default.

The result

200+ investors onboarded through one repeatable document flow.

Anonymized artifact

01Intake
02Template
03Review
04Signature
05Cap table
200+ investors through one repeatable path

Ready to sign18
Complete42
